page_title: Visitor record: Who can apply? - Canada.ca

sections.heading: When to apply
items: If you want to extend your stay as a visitor or change your status (from international student or worker to visitor, for example), you should apply at least 30 days before your current status expires.
The expiry date for your status is on
bullets: the stamp in your passport (This is not the date included on your visitor visa .) If you don’t have a stamp in your passport, the expiry date is 6 months from the day you entered Canada.
If you don’t have a stamp in your passport, the expiry date is 6 months from the day you entered Canada.
your visitor record (if you’ve already extended your stay)
